GRAY_TEMPEST_KEYWORD_RECONSTRUCT.title: Reconstruct
GRAY_TEMPEST_KEYWORD_RECONSTRUCT.descrip: Lose a set amount of Max HP, choose a card from the Nanite Armory to add to your hand and deck. Reconstructed cards can only be permanently improved after combat.
GRAY_TEMPEST_KEYWORD_RECYCLABLE.title: Recyclable
GRAY_TEMPEST_KEYWORD_RECYCLE.title: Recycle
GRAY_TEMPEST_KEYWORD_RECYCLE.description: The chosen card is Exhausted and removed from deck. If Recyclable, gain equal Max HP; otherwise gain 1.
GRAY_TEMPEST_KEYWORD_ONE_SHOT.title: One-Shot
GRAY_TEMPEST_KEYWORD_ONE_SHOT.descriptio: When played, this card is Exhausted and removed from your deck.
GRAY_TEMPEST_KEYWORD_IMPROVE_ACTION.desc: Permanently upgrade the chosen card, spending its Improve Cost in Gold.
GRAY_TEMPEST_KEYWORD_IMPROVE_COST.title: Improve Cost
GRAY_TEMPEST_KEYWORD_IMPROVE_COST.descri: The Gold cost to improve this card.
GRAY_TEMPEST_KEYWORD_MULTI_UPGRADE.title: Multi-Upgrade
GRAY_TEMPEST_KEYWORD_MULTI_UPGRADE.descr: This card can be improved up to {0} times.
GRAY_TEMPEST_KEYWORD_NANITE.title: Nanite
GRAY_TEMPEST_KEYWORD_NANITE.description: A stacking counter on enemies. Each stack enhances specific Nanite cards.
GRAY_TEMPEST_KEYWORD_ENERGY.title: Energy
GRAY_TEMPEST_KEYWORD_ENERGY.description: Deal 25% more damage to enemies without Block.
GRAY_TEMPEST_KEYWORD_KINETIC.title: Kinetic
GRAY_TEMPEST_KEYWORD_KINETIC.description: Deal 25% more damage to enemies with Block.
GRAY_TEMPEST_KEYWORD_BURST.title: Burst
GRAY_TEMPEST_KEYWORD_ASSOCIATION.title: Association
GRAY_TEMPEST_KEYWORD_ASSOCIATION.descrip: When this card enters your deck for the first time, you obtain the associated relic. Upgrading this card strengthens that relic.
